ojrtc_init.tooltip: Initialize PCF85063 RTC (addr 0x51, OJoy I2C SDA5/SCL4 fixed, battery backed)

ojrtc_set_time.message0: [Set time] clock %1 year %2 month %3 day %4 hour %5 min %6 sec %7

ojrtc_set_compile_time.tooltip: Set the clock to the firmware compile time (flash once to calibrate, then it runs on the backup battery)

ojrtc_read.tooltip: Read the current time once, then fetch it with the get/format blocks

ojrtc_format.tooltip: Return a string: date+time / date / time (call "Read once" first)

ojrtc_lost_power.tooltip: Oscillator stopped (power lost without backup) => time is unreliable, set it again

ojrtc_present.tooltip: Probe over I2C whether the RTC responds (0x51)
